_comment: Phase 1 §1.J semantic-golden fixture for Form 135. Each `stampedPerPage[i]` is the ORDERED list of stamped values pdf-parse emits at the tail of page (i+1), in stream order. A code-swap or DRAW_LIST iteration reorder shifts these; a y-shift moves them to a different page; a `pdfUtils.hebrewForPdf` rewrite changes the reversed-glyph form of any Hebrew name. Hebrew strings appear in REVERSED glyph order (e.g. "דהוא"="אוהד", "רב"="בר") because pdfUtils.ts:38-42 hebrewForPdf() reverses Unicode codepoints — pdf-lib has no BiDi. Phase 1 §1.D will replace the reversal with proper BiDi; this fixture's Hebrew entries flip to logical order then. `requiredCodes` is the set of 3-digit codes the form template MUST still print (intersection of DRAW_LIST_135 codes ∩ template-rendered codes — all 28 today). A `scripts/build-field-map.mjs` denylist regression that drops any of these surfaces here.
